William Harrison "Bill" Withers, Jr. (born July 4, 1938) is an American pop/soul singer-songwriter and musician who performed and recorded from 1970 until 1985. Some of his best-known songs are "Lean on Me", "Ain't No Sunshine," "Use Me," "Just the Two of Us", "Lovely Day," and "Grandma's Hands".

Listen to "hypochondriac" here: https://brakence.lnk.to/hypochondriac

Amazon Music: https://brakence.lnk.to/hypochondriac/AmazonMusic
Apple Music: https://brakence.lnk.to/hypochondriac/AppleMusic
iTunes: https://brakence.lnk.to/hypochondriac/iTunes

The weekly boss design is so annoying..
cause im using the kill or be killed team
I mean, its an interesting mechanic but to have to do it 3 times in a row
only weekly things are bp missions, weekly boss, and nono shop right?
again, implement the fucking sweep options
I guess i was wrong earlier
Like i hate people who say "oh you dont like playing the game?" when you're talking about a repeatable farming stage
where it just replays last run
yeah dont really agree with that logic but i understand why they say it
kinda bummed I couldn't get all this
but we started on tuesday so
I don't, that's how a game turns into a daily chore fest and burns you out when you have to do something easy and repeatable.
also i dont think we can get all until u get more policy timer decreases
no yeah i agree but i get why people say it they like repeatable grinds even for easy stuff
I started on thu before getting my rerolled acc and I got assaulted by work even during holiday season <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
even the 3 stage stack thing is slower than doing 1 run at a time with the innate AOE cards

i didnt reroll cause i got lucky
Well I dont have to do anything technically but you get it
yeah but my save is pretty cracked so i can just auto those
Its kind of weird how little support crit rate seems like it gets in czn like the best we can get passive is 20% conditional on cards that cost 2 or more?
Any of them can be auto'd, just the AI is dogshit and it takes forever
I don't know why they even bother with auto mode, just do sweep like morimens and be done with it
yeah because most of crit is on pot and gear
it is but my save is pretty good so it doesnt take that long even ai plays 2 cost cards
Do the stage once and then let you sweep it, not rocket science
so even auto its pretty fast
cause ai cant really mess taht up
Yeah i guess I dont have AOE characters

but they cna just easy farm stages
kayrons aoe is massively nerfed though

its kind of wild to have tier list for farming
but i also think at least so far all the units are good
it usually takes a long time if ever for QOL changes like that
also i dont see people complaining much yet
idk how e7 was with that never played it
once they get to end game they will
and it will hopefully get changed

character strength seems different between the roguelike and finished deckbuild battles. I dunno about a tier list for farming specifically, but breaking things between those two game modes seems reasonable.
It was literally a game you'd keep your emulator open to farm on all fay
Oh well I'll just drop it if it comes to that point
Thankfully this doesn't seem to require nearly as much grind
it's stamina gated so unless they hand out stamina like candy it's not going to be that grindy
But you still have to spend all your stamina
Oh yea I forgot, because of an rng mechanic you could randomly lose fights that you prerecorded
on stupid farming with no sweep
I played Artery Gear which was like an E7 clone but it had offline farming so it could run all your stamina and you would just check the results whenever
Could even set it to use stamina recharges
They implemented that in E7 later too
Same thing like you said you could still fail randomly
If your clear was a bit rng
But like you can farm wh'hile doing other stuff in the game
It would run completely server side so you didnt even need the app up
They monetization was fucked though and they lost all playerbase with a stingy collab where you couldnt even max a characters skills without spending like 100 dollars
